title: EvalRunReport
description: The machine-readable record of ONE live clinical evaluation run over the attested synthetic case set (FL-40). Produced by the eval harness (verification/eval-harness.js via scripts/eval-run.mjs), one report per generation backend. It serialises the scorer's inputs and outputs (verification/eval-scoring.js — scoreCase / scoreCaseTriage / computeCaseSetMetrics / enforceReleaseThresholds) plus the positional-stability verdicts (verification/positional-stability.js) and, for the authoritative live run, the clinician rubric sign-off. This report is the evidence the release gate reads: release_gate.release_ready is the blocking signal FL-52 (production promotion) depends on. SCORING-STORE FIREWALL: the dimension evidence here is derived SCORER-SIDE from sealed nodes 10-13; those nodes never entered any ContextPacket or trunk. This report contains only derived scores + provenance, never sealed-node content.

schema_version.description: The EvalRunReport schema version. Bump only under an approved plan; keep in lockstep with verification/eval-report-schema.js.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this eval run. Format: 'eval-<epoch-ms>-<random-7-chars>'. One run_id per (backend) invocation; the two backend reports of a single certification share a common prefix supplied by the harness.

rubric_version.description: The version tag of docs/grounding/eval-rubric.md that governed the coverage thresholds, the question-matcher threshold, the judge prompt, and the dimension weights for this run. An authoritative live run MUST cite a rubric_version that carries a recorded clinician sign-off (clinician_signoff_ref).

clinician_signoff_ref.description: Optional. Reference to the recorded clinician sign-off of rubric_version (the semantic-rubric approval FL-40 requires). REQUIRED for an authoritative live run (mode='live'); the harness refuses to arm the release gate on a live run without it. Absent for replay/CI runs, which validate the machinery but never certify a release.

backend.description: The generation backend (HEYDOC_LLM_BACKEND) whose Step-4 output this run scored. Certification requires BOTH backends to pass independently (positional bias is a per-model property), so a full certification is two EvalRunReports — one per backend — and the gate is the AND of the two.

mode.description: The eval-run mode. 'replay' drives generation and the communication judge from recorded prompt-hash-keyed fixtures (verification/llm-replay.js) — deterministic, secret-free, the CI-blocking path. 'live' calls the real backend once (secrets-gated, staging only) to record the authoritative run and to (re)capture the replay fixtures. NOTE: this is the EVAL mode and is distinct from the pipeline ContextPacket mode (mock/dry_run/live).

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this eval run executed.

case_set_ref.description: Optional. The corpus snapshot / dataset_version the run covered (for reproducibility — which attested cases at which content hashes).

cases.description: One CaseResult per attested case run through the pipeline. Mirrors the input/output of scoreCase()/scoreCaseTriage() so the report is a faithful serialisation of the scorer, not a re-derivation.

case_id.description: The attested case directory id, e.g. 'SPEC-CARD-01-00023'.

difficulty_tier.description: Optional. Case difficulty band from 00_case_envelope.case_metadata.difficulty_tier (distinct from the safety tier T0-T5).

is_t5.description: True when this is a safety-tier-5 (emergency) case. Drives the zero-tolerance under-triage gate in enforceReleaseThresholds().

turns.description: The multi-turn consult transcript metadata (NOT the raw patient text — audit anchors only). One entry per trunk turn driven by verification/patient-simulator.js.

trunk_id.description: Which trunk produced this turn's output.

candidate_output_hash.description: The medicolegal hash of this turn's candidate output, carried through from the VerificationReport. Preserved verbatim — never recomputed here.

verification_pass.description: The VerificationReport pass gate for this turn. A case's verification_pass is the AND across its turns.

dimensions.description: The four scored clinical dimensions fed to scoreCase() (safety_netting is taken from `triage`, per eval-scoring.js). Weights live in the rubric, not here. history_taking / diagnostic_reasoning / management_quality are deterministic COVERAGE graders; communication is the LLM-JUDGE.

triage.description: The safety-netting tier result from classifyTier()/scoreCaseTriage() against the sealed 13_safety_netting_node (scorer-side). This is dimension 'safety_netting' (weight 0.15) AND the source of the critical-under-triage release blocker.

classification.description: The tier classification band from classifyTier(). 'incomplete' = the consult reached no disposition (trunk disposition blocked_incomplete); excluded from under-triage scoring, ai_tier omitted.

ai_tier.description: Optional. The AI Doctor's assigned safety tier for audit.

verification_pass.description: AND of the turn-level VerificationReport pass gates. FALSE ⇒ the case is ungrounded and receives no clinical score (verification is a gate, not a scored dimension).

fully_scored.description: True only when all four dimensions + triage produced numeric scores. A replay/pre-live run with stubbed dimensions is fully_scored=false — the gate reports but does not ARM (see release_gate.armed).

case_score.description: The weighted case score [0,1], or null when not fully_scored. case_score ≥ 0.70 (+ no auto-fail + verification pass + no critical under-triage) ⇒ clinical_pass.

clinical_pass.description: Whether this case passed per the case-pass rule.

auto_fail.description: Optional. True when an evaluation-guide / node-12-rubric auto-fail condition fired (e.g. a management error-of-commission), forcing clinical_pass=false regardless of score.

positional_stability.description: The M3 positional-stability result (operator ruling 2026-07-15) — EVALUATION-ONLY. checkPositionalStability() is run as a BLOCKING threshold over the deliberately-selected long-list cases. A per-model property, so it is measured per backend.

overall.description: Aggregate verdict. 'unstable' on ANY long-list case blocks release; 'indeterminate' on a long-list case also blocks (the harness refuses to certify what it cannot judge); 'not_applicable' only when the run contains no qualifying long-list cases — which is itself a coverage gap the harness flags (the M3 ruling REQUIRES long-list cases).

long_list_case_ids.description: The case_ids selected as long-list (long differential / polypharmacy / long disclosure list). MUST be non-empty for a certifying run — an empty set means the run only certified the easy shape.

metrics.description: The case-set aggregate from computeCaseSetMetrics() — the exact input to enforceReleaseThresholds(). Serialised verbatim so the gate decision is reconstructable.

grounding_compliance.description: Fraction of cases with verification_pass. Gate: ≥ 0.90.

fully_scored.description: Count of fully_scored cases. armed = fully_scored > 0.

t5_critical_under_triage_count.description: T5 (emergency) critical under-triage count. Zero-tolerance gate: 0.

incomplete_count.description: Optional. Cases whose consult reached no disposition (blocked_incomplete) — excluded from under-triage; a measurement/turn-plan gap, not a triage miss.

release_gate.description: The output of enforceReleaseThresholds(metrics). release_ready is the blocking signal. armed=false (no fully_scored case — e.g. a replay run with stubbed dimensions) means the gate REPORTS but cannot certify; the two hard safety conditions (grounding, critical under-triage) still block even when unarmed.

release_ready.description: armed AND zero blocking_reasons. The single signal scripts/eval-run.mjs exits non-zero on when false in a gating context.

armed.description: metrics.fully_scored > 0. The clinical-pass-rate condition only bites when armed.

blocking_reasons.description: Human-readable block reasons from enforceReleaseThresholds(). Empty when nothing blocks.

coverage_dimension.description: A deterministic COVERAGE-scored dimension: the trunk output / consult transcript is matched against the sealed grading node (10/11/12 or the elicited-disclosure set from 02) scorer-side. Fully reproducible — the evidence is the receipt-equivalent.

score.description: [0,1], or null when the dimension was stubbed (replay/pre-live).

matched.description: Ids/labels of required items the output covered (e.g. DI-001, a must_include_item, a differential dx).

missed.description: Required items the output failed to cover.

total.description: Denominator: required items in scope for this dimension/case.

penalised.description: Optional. Error-of-commission items the output WRONGLY included (e.g. a contraindicated drug from node-12 errors_of_commission). A non-empty list can trigger case-level auto_fail per the rubric.

judge_dimension.description: The communication dimension (weight 0.05) scored by the LLM-JUDGE. Eval-side and receipt-gated: no judge_receipt ⇒ no score. Replayable via prompt_hash; the verdict is quantised to a tolerance band so judge variance cannot flip a near-threshold pass/fail.

score.description: [0,1] quantised score, or null when stubbed.

judge_receipt.description: Mirrors the Receipt core (receipt.schema.json: request_id/timestamp_utc/upstream/mode) with eval-specific fields. 'mode' here uses the EVAL enum (replay/live), and 'upstream' is the judge model id.

prompt_hash.description: Hash of the exact judge prompt — the replay key.

verdict.description: The judge's raw categorical verdict before quantisation (e.g. 'clear', 'adequate', 'confusing').

produced_by: verification/eval-harness.js via scripts/eval-run.mjs — one report per backend
consumed_by: scripts/eval-run.mjs — exits non-zero when release_gate.release_ready is false in a gating context
.github/workflows/staging-eval.yml — replay-mode run blocking on every PR; live-mode job in staging
Medicolegal audit — the authoritative live run is persisted append-only (WORM); turn candidate_output_hash chains to the VerificationReport ledger
_integration_notes.scorer_source: verification/eval-scoring.js — this report serialises scoreCase/scoreCaseTriage/computeCaseSetMetrics/enforceReleaseThresholds I/O verbatim
_integration_notes.firewall_note: Sealed nodes 10-13 are read SCORER-SIDE only (verification/eval-scoring.js + the dimension graders). They never enter a ContextPacket or a trunk. This report carries DERIVED scores + item ids/labels as evidence, never sealed-node content.
_integration_notes.rubric_source: docs/grounding/eval-rubric.md — coverage thresholds, question-matcher threshold, judge prompt, dimension weights; clinician-signed for a certifying run
